core_payload.content:
# A2C (Anything-to-Capsules): The Cognitive Refinery

## 1. Role
A2C is the governed refinery that turns hostile, ambiguous, and high-volume source material into graph-admissible capsule state. It routes that refinery through five bounded sub-hubs so readiness law, material preparation, candidate construction, governance handoff, and admission mechanics remain explicit instead of collapsing into one 19-link parent directory.

## 2. Routing Surfaces
- `readiness-control` owns activation readiness, workspace recon, and deep intake risk scoring before stage work begins.
- `material-preparation` owns ingest, normalize, segment, and extract as the early mechanical refinery line.
- `candidate-construction` owns synthesize, link, and graph-aware swarm support for candidate assembly.
- `governance-handoffs` owns routing posture, validation judgment, and controlled vault landing once evidence exists.
- `admission-emission` owns hash, validate, and emit as the terminal admission mechanics.

## 3. Parent Boundary
The parent A2C hub keeps only the top-level relationship to CapsuleOS, DeepMine, N1Hub, To Dig Deep, the Mining Company frame, the A2C project envelope, and the five refinery sub-hubs. Detailed stage routing now flows through those sub-hubs so A2C remains the refinery contract for sovereign memory rather than a flat list of every stage and policy surface.

neuro_concentrate.summary: A2C routes the refinery through five bounded surfaces: readiness control, material preparation, candidate construction, governance handoffs, and admission emission. The parent keeps only top-level relationships to CapsuleOS, DeepMine, N1Hub, To Dig Deep, the Mining Company frame, the A2C project envelope, and the five sub-hubs. This makes refinery doctrine more legible because pre-mutation control, stage mechanics, policy routing, and terminal admission no longer hide inside one overloaded parent capsule. The parent now reads as a routing contract instead of a flat inventory.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-language so the capsule states present refinery doctrine directly.
Refactored A2C into five bounded sub-hubs so readiness control, stage mechanics, governance handoff, and admission surfaces no longer collapse into a 19-link parent hub.
